faqs.question: How much does a digital marketing agency charge per month in India?
faqs.lead: Most SMB programs cost ₹20,000–₹50,000 monthly; DigiSutra starter plans begin at ₹19,999.
faqs.rest: That entry price covers SEO or one paid channel; full-funnel programs spanning several channels start at ₹49,999 per month. Pricing scales with channels and goals, not a one-size-fits-all package.

faqs.question: Do I get locked into a long contract when I hire a marketing agency?
faqs.lead: No lock-in — marketing retainers pause with 30 days notice.
faqs.rest: Development and e-commerce projects run on fixed quotes with milestone payments, so costs are agreed before any work starts. The free 48-hour audit shows you the roadmap before you commit a rupee.

faqs.question: How much does a website cost in India and what affects the price?
faqs.lead: Business websites start at ₹35,000; page count, custom design, integrations and e-commerce features drive the final price.
faqs.rest: E-commerce stores with payments and shipping built in start at ₹60,000. Every project gets a fixed quote up front, so the number you approve is the number you pay — no hourly surprises.

faqs.question: Do I pay upfront for a website or in milestones?
faqs.lead: You pay in milestones — an agreed portion at each completed stage, never the whole amount up front.
faqs.rest: The quote is fixed before development starts, so scope changes get discussed rather than silently billed. Marketing retainers work differently — simple monthly billing with no long-term lock-in, so you only commit to work you have approved.

faqs.question: Does the monthly agency fee include my ad spend?
faqs.lead: No — management fees and ad spend are separate; ads management starts at ₹15,000/mo while ad budget goes directly to Google or Meta.
faqs.rest: Your ad budget is paid straight to Google, Meta or LinkedIn; the management fee covers strategy, optimization and reporting. Keeping the two separate means you always know what reached the platform and what paid for expertise.

faqs.question: How long does SEO take to show results?
faqs.lead: SEO typically shows first movement in 4–6 weeks, compounding from month three.
faqs.rest: Early weeks bring technical fixes, indexing gains and long-tail visibility; traffic and leads then build as content and authority stack up. Any agency guaranteeing overnight rankings is a red flag.

faqs.question: Is SEO still worth it in 2026 with AI Overviews and ChatGPT?
faqs.lead: Yes — AI Overviews and chatbots cite the well-structured pages SEO builds.
faqs.rest: Assistants pull answers from clearly structured, entity-rich, authoritative content — exactly what good SEO produces. The work now includes being citable by AI engines alongside ranking in classic Google results.

faqs.question: What do AEO and GEO mean in digital marketing?
faqs.lead: AEO and GEO make your content the answer that ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews cite.
faqs.rest: AEO stands for Answer Engine Optimization, GEO for Generative Engine Optimization — in practice, answer-first pages, clean schema markup and facts an AI can quote verbatim. Our SEO retainers cover both alongside classic Google rankings.

faqs.question: How do I rank my business on Google in Noida and Delhi NCR?
faqs.lead: Local rankings come from an optimized Google Business Profile, local pages and genuine reviews.
faqs.rest: Consistent citations and content targeting the searches NCR customers actually type matter just as much. We run local SEO from our Sector 62, Noida HQ, and the free 15-page audit shows exactly where your local visibility leaks.

faqs.question: How will I know if my SEO is actually working?
faqs.lead: You track rankings, organic traffic and leads month over month — a good SEO report ties work done to business outcomes, not vanity metrics.
faqs.rest: We report in plain English and answer questions over WhatsApp with same-day human replies. If numbers stall, you see it — and with a 30-day pause option, we have to keep earning the retainer.

faqs.question: What is the minimum ad budget to start Google or Meta ads in India?
faqs.lead: There is no platform-mandated minimum; our ads management starts at ₹15,000/mo and we size your media budget to your market and goals.
faqs.rest: Most SMBs start lean, prove which campaigns convert, then scale the winners — click costs vary widely by industry, so a plumber and a SaaS firm need very different starting points.

faqs.question: Google Ads or Meta Ads — which is better for my business?
faqs.lead: Google Ads captures people already searching for your product; Meta Ads creates demand by putting you in front of the right audience first.
faqs.rest: High-intent services usually start with Google; visual products and B2C brands often win on Meta, and B2B on LinkedIn. We manage all three, and our clients average 5.8× ROAS across channels.

faqs.question: How quickly do paid ads start generating leads?
faqs.lead: Paid ads can generate leads within days of launch, unlike SEO which compounds over months.
faqs.rest: Expect a testing phase while audiences and creatives find their footing — performance improves as data accumulates. Because retainers pause with 30 days notice, you are never locked in while campaigns prove themselves.

faqs.question: What is the difference between a WordPress site and a custom Next.js website?
faqs.lead: WordPress suits content-led sites you edit yourself; a custom-coded site delivers faster load times and tighter security for growth-focused businesses.
faqs.rest: We build both, and recommend based on how you will actually use the site — not what is easiest to sell. Either route starts at ₹35,000 for a business website; the right stack depends on editing needs, speed and integrations.

faqs.question: What do I need to launch an online store in India?
faqs.lead: You need product pages, secure payments, shipping integration and order management — a complete e-commerce store starts at ₹60,000.
faqs.rest: We handle catalog setup, payment gateway integration and a mobile-friendly checkout, then hand over an admin panel you can run yourself. Add SEO or ads once the store is live to start driving traffic.

faqs.question: Can AI automation replace my marketing team or agency?
faqs.lead: No — AI agents automate follow-up, reporting and repetitive workflows; strategy stays human.
faqs.rest: DigiSutra builds AI automation agents that answer enquiries, chase leads and compile reports around the clock, while human specialists own positioning, campaigns and creative.

faqs.question: What can a WhatsApp chatbot actually do for a small business?
faqs.lead: A WhatsApp bot can answer FAQs, qualify leads, book appointments and send order updates 24/7 — setup starts at ₹15,000.
faqs.rest: Full builds from ₹40,000 connect the bot to your CRM so every conversation becomes a tracked lead. The bot handles repetitive queries; your team steps in for conversations that need a human.

faqs.question: How does AI automation stop leads from going cold?
faqs.lead: An AI bot replies the instant an enquiry lands, so no lead goes cold waiting for a human.
faqs.rest: The bot asks qualifying questions, records every answer and hands warm prospects to your team in real time. That first-minute response is often the difference between a booked call and a lost enquiry.

faqs.question: What does a free website audit include and is it really free?
faqs.lead: Yes — the audit is genuinely free: a 15-page report in 48 hours.
faqs.rest: It covers SEO health, site speed, UX and conversion blockers, with no charge and no obligation to hire DigiSutra afterward. Use it as a prioritised fix-list even if you never become a client.

faqs.question: Can an agency in India work with clients in the USA, UK or Australia?
faqs.lead: Yes — DigiSutra already serves clients in 12 countries from Noida, India.
faqs.rest: Remote delivery is standard: campaigns run on the same Google and Meta ad platforms whether you're in Sydney, London or New York, and async reporting keeps international accounts moving between time zones.

faqs.question: Do you provide support and updates over WhatsApp?
faqs.lead: Support and project updates run over WhatsApp — no ticket queues or email chains.
faqs.rest: Clients message the team directly for campaign questions, approvals and quick fixes, alongside regular performance reporting. It keeps decisions moving fast.

faqs.question: What happens after I contact DigiSutra Solutions?
faqs.lead: You get a free 15-page website and growth audit within 48 hours — no obligation and no pressure to sign anything.
faqs.rest: The audit shows exactly what is broken and what to fix first; if you like the plan, we scope the engagement — no pressure either way. Everything after that runs over WhatsApp with real humans replying same-day.
